item.title: One slip of the tongue, forever remembered
item.description: One small slip of the tongue and now it’s apparently permanent. The kind of thing friends will bring up forever.

media:content.media:title: One slip of the tongue, forever remembered
media:content.media:description: One small slip of the tongue and now it’s apparently permanent. The kind of thing friends will bring up forever.

item.title: That One Friend in the Car
item.description: We all know that one friend who keeps the car on blessed music only. A very familiar ride with a very specific vibe.

media:content.media:title: That One Friend in the Car
media:content.media:description: We all know that one friend who keeps the car on blessed music only. A very familiar ride with a very specific vibe.

item.title: When your memory is this bad
item.description: Your secrets are safe with me... because I’ll probably forget them anyway. A very relatable memory struggle.

media:content.media:title: When your memory is this bad
media:content.media:description: Your secrets are safe with me... because I’ll probably forget them anyway. A very relatable memory struggle.

item.title: When a text tone changes
item.description: It’s the slight change in tone for me. Now I’m spending the next three hours decoding a 4-word text.

media:content.media:title: When a text tone changes
media:content.media:description: It’s the slight change in tone for me. Now I’m spending the next three hours decoding a 4-word text.
